case_title: COREY PERLMUTTER VS. PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERLMUTTER, COREY
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-03-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-19-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERLMUTTER, COREY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THAT THE LIKELY CAUSE OF DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTORCYCLE IS COLLISION WITH ANOTHER VEHICLE OR OBJECT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PURCHASE FROM DEFENDANT INSURANCE COVERAGE FOR DAMAGE CAUSED BY COLLISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-23-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,654.00 FILED BY PERLMUTTER, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERLMUTTER, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERLMUTTER, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF COREY PERLMUTTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROGESSIVE DIRSCT INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BYMARCUS AGUIRRE, SENIOR ESTIMATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
